intro: Keep climbing, keep swinging, and never lose your grip.
description:
Step into a chaotic, fast-paced escape where you control a fragile yet determined egg with arms, fighting through dangerous attic-filled levels in a desperate attempt to break free. Every stage is packed with unstable platforms, shifting hazards, and unpredictable physics that constantly threaten to crack your shell. Survival depends on precision, timing, and staying one piece under pressure.

Across each level, you’ll swing, climb, and launch your egg through increasingly complex environments where no two runs feel the same.
Multiple paths and hidden routes encourage experimentation, speed, and smarter movement, rewarding those who master both control and creativity.

As you progress, the challenge escalates with faster sections, tighter spaces, and more demanding obstacles, pushing your skills to the limit. Along the way, you’ll unlock a wide variety of egg costumes, giving your fragile hero personality while you fight through chaos toward freedom.

Key Features
• Throw yourself into freedom through dangerous egg-filled stages
• Discover multiple routes for optimal speed and better runs
• Unlock a variety of costumes for your egg and customize your look
• Survive physics-based chaos where every move can crack or save you
• Master increasingly difficult levels packed with traps and hazards

Stay steady, avoid cracking, and guide your egg to freedom in this unpredictable escape.
